---
title: "Baobao Fang"
image: images/Baobao/Baobao_profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mtfang@sas.upenn.edu
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/stories/highlights/18070496642548120/
---

**Security Guard** at **the Meowtropolitan Museum of Art** in New York City 

I collect tennis balls, sticks, peacock feathers, and anything Mengting brings to me.

I am also a **freelance scientist** and am composing a grand research plan. 

Funding pending. Peer review ongoing (self-reviewed, very positive).

For collaboration, contact my assistant, Mengting 🐾
